No Poverty.reason: The course content on commercial contracts does not directly address poverty eradication or related targets.

Zero Hunger.reason: The course content on commercial contracts has no direct relevance to ending hunger or improving food security.

Quality Education.reason: As a university law course for 3rd/4th year students, it directly provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and equips students with professional legal skills for employment (Target 4.4).

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: The course is fundamental to understanding and upholding the rule of law (Target 16.3) in commercial transactions and contributes to developing effective, accountable institutions (Target 16.6) that govern commerce, including intellectual property rights.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: Skills in drafting commercial contracts are crucial for establishing and managing effective public-private partnerships (Target 17.17) and supporting a rules-based multilateral trading system (Target 17.10).
